title: Standard library artifact manifest in pckg UI

source.subject: feat: standard library artifact manifest and UI consolidation

body:
Surfaces **standard library artifact manifest** data in the pckg dashboard and consolidates related UI.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`aea8fe6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/aea8fe6)
- **Subject:** feat: standard library artifact manifest and UI consolidation
- **Completed:** 2026-03-18

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Registry UX for stdlib versions produced by compiler/corelib CI.
